political.s: FEC: $31K PAC donations; 33% to Republican, 67% to Democratic committees.

charity.s: $105M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.33% of revenue) via Amgen Foundation. Operates the The Amgen Foundation Inc: $30.0M in charitable contributions, gifts & grants paid (FY2023, IRS Form 990-PF).
charity.focus: Science education, medical education, community health, disaster relief

dei.s: HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture.

execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 160:1 (median employee pay $154,123; CEO total compensation $8K) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2025).

wiki.extract: Amgen Inc. is an American multinational biopharmaceutical company headquartered in Thousand Oaks, California. The company is ranked 18th on the list of largest biomedical companies by revenue. The name "AMGen" is a portmanteau of the company's original name, Applied Molecular Genetics.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in or compressed by equipment or objects, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was performing routine maintenance on a process vessel. While the employee was lowering the vessel head plate into position over the vessel, a member of the lifting mechanism unexpectedly shifted, causing the employee's right ring finger to become pinched between the mechanism and the head plate. The employee's finger was partially amputated.
